evals.prompt: Patch Newtonsoft.Json 13.0.3 so that JsonConvert.SerializeObject prepends the string "[PATCHED] " to every serialization result. Then create a .NET console app that references Newtonsoft.Json 13.0.3, serializes the object `new { name = "test" }`, and prints the result to stdout. Swap in the patched DLL and run the app. Save the console output to a file called `result.txt` in the outputs directory.
evals.expected_output: result.txt contains a line starting with [PATCHED] followed by the JSON

assertions.text: result.txt contains the serialized JSON with name:test

evals.prompt: Patch Polly 8.5.0 so that whenever a retry occurs due to an exception, it writes a line to stderr in the format: `POLLY-RETRY: <exception type full name>`. Then create a .NET console app that: (1) references Polly 8.5.0, (2) sets up a retry policy that retries 2 times, (3) executes a delegate that throws an InvalidOperationException on the first two calls then succeeds on the third. Run the app and save stderr to `result.txt` in the outputs directory.

Patch Serilog (latest version) so that every log event automatically includes a property called `MachineName` with the value of Environment.MachineName, without requiring any enricher configuration. Then create a .NET console app that: (1) references Serilog and Serilog.Sinks.Console, (2) creates a logger with WriteTo.Console(outputTemplate: "{Properties}\n"), (3) logs a single Information message "hello". Swap in the patched Serilog DLL and run the app. Save stdout to `result.txt` in the outputs directory.
evals.expected_output: result.txt contains MachineName property in the output

assertions.text: result.txt contains 'MachineName' as a property key
